creator: dpelleg+bsd@cs.cmu.edu
text:
"make package" fails for kdegraphics2:

Creating gzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/distfiles/pkgs//All/kdegraphics-2.2.tgz'
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/kdvi/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/kfract/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/kghostview/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/kiconedit/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/kpaint/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/kruler/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/ksnapshot/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
tar: can't add file share/doc/HTML/en/kview/index.cache.bz2 : No such file or directory
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/kdegraphics2.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/kdegraphics2 && make package
